calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2017 Dismissal - No Appearance

Plaintiff Oakville Produce Partners, Llcs Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Truth Of Matters Stated In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Il Massimo Del Panino, Inc., Dba Il Massimo.
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Kaipolani K. Young of the law offices of Leader-Picone & Young LLP (510.444.2404, ext. 23)) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

Plaintiff Oakville Produce Partners, Llcs Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Truth Of Matters Stated In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Il Massimo Del Panino, Inc., Dba Il Massimo is Granted no opposition filed. No sanctions awarded as defendant is a corporation and cannot appear without counsel. Production compliance date set at December 12, 2016. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert F. Kane; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Richard L. Grossman of Pillsbury Coleman LLP (415-433-8000) appears as withdrawing counsel for defendant, Il Massimo Del Panino

No other appearance is made in this matter

Court inquires and hears from withdrawing counsel.

ATTONREY RICHARD GROSSMAN OF PILLSBURY & COLEMAN, LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF OF RECORD for defendant IL MASSIMO DEL PANINO, INC is GRANTED effective forthwith. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-03-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
